<!-- generated by scripts/gen-commands-doc.ts — do not edit by hand. Run `pnpm gen:docs`. -->

# Command reference

`dna` exposes its full surface as a CLI. Every read command supports `--json` (stable contract) and `--markdown` (LLM-optimal); ANSI colors auto-strip when piped.

## `ask`

Record an open question against a symbol

```
ask [options] <symbol>
```

**Options:**

- `--question <text>` — The unresolved question
- `--asked-by <who>` — Who asked it (defaults to git user.name if set)
- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

## `assume`

Record/verify assumptions about a symbol

```
assume [options] [command]
```

### `assume add`

Record an unverified assumption

```
assume add [options] <symbol> <statement>
```

**Options:**

- `--confidence <level>` — low|medium|high *(default: "medium")*
- `--evidence <text>` — Optional pointer or rationale
- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

### `assume verify`

Mark an assumption as verified

```
assume verify [options] <symbol> <id>
```

**Options:**

- `--evidence <text>` — Evidence supporting verification
- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

## `assumptions`

List assumptions recorded for a symbol

```
assumptions [options] <symbol>
```

**Options:**

- `--unverified` — Only unverified
- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

## `attach`

Distill a conversation transcript into Decision records anchored to symbols

```
attach [options]
```

**Options:**

- `--transcript <path>` — Path to the conversation transcript file
- `--session <id>` — Logical session/PR/conversation ID to tag decisions with *(default: "transcript")*
- `--symbol <name>` — Constrain extraction to these symbols; repeatable *(default: [])*
- `--dry-run` — Render the prompt for a native agent (default)
- `--call-api` — Call the bundled Anthropic client instead of printing a prompt
- `--save-without-confirm` — Write extracted decisions to .dna/decisions/ without interactive prompt
- `--api-key <key>` — Anthropic API key (default: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env)
- `--model <id>` — Anthropic model ID (default: claude-opus-4-7)
- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

## `audit`

Run self-audit checks for the current session

```
audit [options]
```

**Options:**

- `--session` — Audit the active session (default) *(default: true)*
- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

## `bench`

Run repo-edit-bench (harness lands in v0.2)

```
bench [options]
```

## `capture-preference`

Heuristically extract preferences from a prompt (UserPromptSubmit hook)

```
capture-preference [options]
```

**Options:**

- `--text <t>` — Prompt text (otherwise read from stdin)
- `--emit` — Print captured preferences back to stdout (markdown block)
- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

## `check-proposal`

Detect when a proposal matches a previously rejected alternative

```
check-proposal [options]
```

**Options:**

- `--proposed <text>` — The proposed change description
- `--symbol <name>` — Restrict to one symbol's decisions
- `--threshold <n>` — Jaccard similarity threshold (0-1) *(default: 0.25)*
- `--fail-on-conflict` — Exit 1 if a conflict is found
- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

## `conflicts`

Detect potential contradictions between invariants, decisions, and notes

```
conflicts [options] <symbol>
```

**Options:**

- `--fail-on-conflict` — Exit 1 if any conflict is found
- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

## `context`

Full multi-strand context for a symbol — or a whole feature

```
context [options] [symbol]
```

**Options:**

- `--json` — Emit JSON (best for tool chaining)
- `--markdown` — Emit markdown (best for piping into an LLM)
- `--depth <n>` — Caller/callee depth *(default: 2)*
- `--since <when>` — Drop notes/decisions/provenance older than this (ISO or 7d/2w/3mo)
- `--authored-by <name>` — Filter decisions + provenance to one author
- `--feature <label>` — Aggregate context for a feature instead of a symbol
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

## `context-from-prompt`

Extract symbols from prompt text and surface their context (used by UserPromptSubmit hooks)

```
context-from-prompt [options]
```

**Options:**

- `--text <text>` — Prompt text (otherwise read from stdin)
- `--limit <n>` — Max symbols to surface *(default: 3)*
- `--min-len <n>` — Minimum candidate token length *(default: 4)*
- `--json` — Emit JSON instead of markdown
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

## `contract-build`

Build & save an edit contract for a symbol

```
contract-build [options] <symbol>
```

**Options:**

- `--intent <text>` — What you plan to change *(default: "(unspecified)")*
- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

## `contributors`

Who has the most context on this symbol (commits + decisions)

```
contributors [options] <symbol>
```

**Options:**

- `--limit <n>` — Max contributors to show *(default: "10")*
- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

## `decide`

Record a decision made about a symbol (choice + rejected alternative + rationale)

```
decide [options] <symbol>
```

**Options:**

- `--decision <text>` — The choice that was made
- `--rejected <text>` — The alternative that was rejected (and why it lost)
- `--rationale <text>` — Why this decision was made
- `--made-by <name>` — Who made the decision
- `--session <id>` — Session, PR, or conversation ID this came from
- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

## `decisions`

List decisions recorded for a symbol (or all)

```
decisions [options] [symbol]
```

**Options:**

- `--all` — List every decision
- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

## `feature`

Named bags of symbols, learned by observing what the agent touches

```
feature [options] [command]
```

### `feature use`

Set the active feature for this session (the agent calls this once when it understands the user's intent)

```
feature use [options] <label...>
```

**Options:**

- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

### `feature list`

List known features

```
feature list [options]
```

**Options:**

- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

### `feature show`

Top symbols for a feature

```
feature show [options] <label>
```

**Options:**

- `--limit <n>` — Max symbols *(default: 10)*
- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

### `feature attribute`

Bump symbol weights for touched files under the active feature (called by Stop hook)

```
feature attribute [options]
```

**Options:**

- `--git-diff` — Use `git diff --name-only HEAD` to determine touched files
- `--files <files...>` — Explicit file list (overrides --git-diff)
- `--action <a>` — edit | read *(default: "edit")*
- `--feature <label>` — Target feature (defaults to active)
- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

### `feature rename`

Rename a feature (merges into destination if it already exists)

```
feature rename [options] <from> <to>
```

**Options:**

- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

### `feature merge`

Merge one feature into another

```
feature merge [options] <from> <into>
```

**Options:**

- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

### `feature overlap`

Symbols shared between two features (signals coupling)

```
feature overlap [options] <a> <b>
```

**Options:**

- `--threshold <n>` — Minimum min(weight_a, weight_b) *(default: "0.2")*
- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

### `feature isolate`

Symbols exclusive to this feature (its true core)

```
feature isolate [options] <label>
```

**Options:**

- `--threshold <n>` — Other-feature weight to count as shared *(default: "0.1")*
- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

### `feature clear-active`

Clear the active-feature pointer (called by SessionStart hook)

```
feature clear-active [options]
```

**Options:**

- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

### `feature active`

Print the active feature label, if any

```
feature active [options]
```

**Options:**

- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

### `feature switch`

Mid-session swap: flush dirty-file attribution to the prev feature, then aim at <label>

```
feature switch [options] <label...>
```

**Options:**

- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

### `feature gc`

Prune low-weight symbols from a feature bag (or all if omitted)

```
feature gc [options] [label]
```

**Options:**

- `--threshold <n>` — Weight below which symbols are pruned *(default: 0.05)*
- `--dry-run` — Show what would be pruned without writing
- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

### `feature attribution`

Inspect the last attribution write

```
feature attribution [options] [command]
```

#### `feature attribution last`

Print the last attribution result with per-symbol confidence

```
feature attribution last [options]
```

**Options:**

- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

### `feature diff`

Show how a feature's top-N symbols have shifted since a date

```
feature diff [options] <label>
```

**Options:**

- `--since <iso>` — Baseline date (ISO-8601)
- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

## `find`

Fuzzy search for symbols

```
find [options] <query>
```

**Options:**

- `--json` — Emit JSON instead of pretty output
- `--limit <n>` — Max results *(default: 20)*
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

## `gate`

Fail when changed files touch blocking invariants (unless waived)

```
gate [options]
```

**Options:**

- `--diff` — Gate the current working diff *(default: false)*
- `--base <ref>` — Diff base (default HEAD) *(default: "HEAD")*
- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

## `health`

Knowledge-layer health for one feature or all features

```
health [options]
```

**Options:**

- `--feature <label>` — Feature label to score
- `--all` — List every feature
- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

## `impact`

Blast radius (symbols, files, tests) of changing a symbol, or every symbol in the diff

```
impact [options] [symbol]
```

**Options:**

- `--json` — Emit JSON (best for tool chaining)
- `--markdown` — Emit markdown (best for piping into an LLM)
- `--hops <n>` — Transitive caller depth *(default: 3)*
- `--diff` — Compute impact for every symbol in the working-tree diff
- `--base <ref>` — Diff base (default HEAD) *(default: "HEAD")*
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

## `index`

Scan repo, build symbol graph, write .dna/index/symbols.json

```
index [options]
```

**Options:**

- `--quiet` — Suppress stdout (for hook usage)
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

## `init`

Initialize .dna/ in this directory (config + invariants)

```
init [options]
```

**Options:**

- `--force` — Overwrite existing files
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

## `install`

Install dna agent integrations

```
install [options] [command]
```

### `install claude`

Install Claude Code CLI-first instructions, skill, and hooks

```
install claude [options]
```

**Options:**

- `--force` — Overwrite existing dna-managed Claude files
- `--skip-claude-md` — Do not append dna instructions to CLAUDE.md
- `--use-global` — Generate hooks that call `dna` directly (requires global install)
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

### `install codex`

Install Codex CLI integration: AGENTS.md, .codex/config.toml notify + MCP

```
install codex [options]
```

**Options:**

- `--force` — Overwrite existing dna-managed Codex files
- `--skip-agents-md` — Do not append dna instructions to AGENTS.md
- `--use-global` — Configure Codex to call `dna` directly (requires global install)
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

### `install cursor`

Install Cursor integration: .cursor/rules/dna.mdc + .cursor/mcp.json

```
install cursor [options]
```

**Options:**

- `--force` — Overwrite existing dna-managed Cursor files
- `--skip-mcp` — Do not write .cursor/mcp.json (rule file only)
- `--use-global` — Configure MCP to call `dna` directly (requires global install)
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

## `invariant`

Author invariants — starter packs and (future) interactive flows

```
invariant [options] [command]
```

### `invariant init`

Append a starter pack of invariants to .dna/invariants.yml

```
invariant init [options]
```

**Options:**

- `--stack <name>` — Pack to install: stripe | auth | gdpr | multi-tenant | http-api
- `--dry-run` — Print the merged file without writing
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

## `invariants`

Invariants that apply to a symbol (or list all)

```
invariants [options] [symbol]
```

**Options:**

- `--json` — Emit JSON instead of pretty output
- `--feature <label>` — Sort/filter invariants by relevance to a feature's weight bag
- `--limit <n>` — When --feature is set, cap top symbols read *(default: 50)*
- `--diff` — List invariants that apply to symbols in the working-tree diff
- `--base <ref>` — Diff base (default HEAD) *(default: "HEAD")*
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

## `learn`

Record a lesson learned about a symbol (anchored memory)

```
learn [options] <symbol>
```

**Options:**

- `--lesson <text>` — The lesson to record
- `--severity <level>` — low | medium | high *(default: "medium")*
- `--evidence <ref>` — PR ID, doc path, commit, incident — what backs this lesson
- `--source <s>` — agent | human | doc | git | promoted | todo *(default: "human")*
- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

## `learn-todos`

Lift TODO(symbol): / FIXME(symbol): comments in the repo into notes

```
learn-todos [options]
```

**Options:**

- `--dry-run` — Print what would be recorded; write nothing
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

## `lessons`

Manage tiered repo lessons (global → CLAUDE.md, scoped → .dna/notes/*)

```
lessons [options] [command]
```

### `lessons record`

Classify and persist a lesson. Heuristic picks scope; LLM is a tie-breaker.

```
lessons record [options] <lesson>
```

**Options:**

- `--severity <level>` — low | medium | high *(default: "medium")*
- `--evidence <ref>` — PR/commit/doc backing this lesson
- `--hint-scope <scope>` — Bias the classifier (global|symbol|file|feature)
- `--hint-target <target>` — Bias the target (symbol name, file path, feature label)
- `--force-scope <scope>` — Skip classification (global|symbol|file|feature)
- `--force-target <target>` — Required when force-scope is symbol|file|feature
- `--dry-run` — Show classification without writing
- `--no-llm` — Disable LLM tie-breaker (heuristic only)
- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

### `lessons list`

List recorded lessons across scopes

```
lessons list [options]
```

**Options:**

- `--scope <scope>` — global | symbol | file | feature
- `--target <t>` — Filter by target
- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

### `lessons reclassify`

Move a lesson between scopes (e.g. promote scoped → global)

```
lessons reclassify [options] <id>
```

**Options:**

- `--to <scope>` — global | symbol | file | feature
- `--to-target <t>` — Required for symbol|file|feature
- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

## `notes`

List notes attached to a symbol (or all)

```
notes [options] [symbol]
```

**Options:**

- `--all` — List every note across every symbol
- `--include-promoted` — Include notes already lifted to invariants
- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

## `plan`

Rank candidate symbols for a prompt (used before `prepare`)

```
plan [options] <prompt...>
```

**Options:**

- `--limit <n>` — Max candidates *(default: 5)*
- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

## `postmortem`

LLM proposes an invariant from a PR or diff that would have caught the regression

```
postmortem [options]
```

**Options:**

- `--pr <number>` — PR number (uses `gh pr view` + `gh pr diff`)
- `--diff-file <path>` — Local diff file (alternative to --pr)
- `--symbol <name>` — Symbol that regressed; repeatable *(default: [])*
- `--pr-title <text>` — PR title (when using --diff-file)
- `--pr-body <text>` — PR body (when using --diff-file)
- `--test-output <path>` — Path to failing test output (optional, improves rule quality)
- `--dry-run` — Render the prompt for a native agent (default)
- `--call-api` — Call the bundled Anthropic client instead of printing a prompt
- `--append-without-confirm` — Skip the interactive confirmation and append directly
- `--api-key <key>` — Anthropic API key (default: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env)
- `--model <id>` — Anthropic model ID (default: claude-opus-4-7)
- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

## `pr-intent`

Extract Decision records from a PR's description, reviews, and comments (the *why* git blame cannot show)

```
pr-intent [options]
```

**Options:**

- `--pr <number>` — PR number to read
- `--dry-run` — Render the prompt for a native agent (default)
- `--call-api` — Call the bundled Anthropic client instead of printing a prompt
- `--save-without-confirm` — Write extracted decisions to .dna/decisions/ without interactive prompt
- `--api-key <key>` — Anthropic API key (default: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env)
- `--model <id>` — Anthropic model ID (default: claude-opus-4-7)
- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

## `prefer`

Record a personal preference (e.g. "keep PRs under 300 lines")

```
prefer [options] <text...>
```

**Options:**

- `--scope <s>` — repo | user | global *(default: "repo")*
- `--topic <t>` — Tag (e.g. pr, tests, style)
- `--evidence <e>` — Why this preference (link, quote)
- `--source <s>` — manual | auto | wizard *(default: "manual")*
- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

## `preferences`

List personal preferences captured for this repo

```
preferences [options]
```

**Options:**

- `--topic <t>` — Filter by topic
- `--limit <n>` — Max to show *(default: 50)*
- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--markdown` — Emit dna-auto-prefs markdown block (for hooks)
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

## `prepare`

Decision-ready brief before editing a symbol (calls prepare_edit)

```
prepare [options] [symbol]
```

**Options:**

- `--intent <text>` — What you plan to change *(default: "(unspecified)")*
- `--budget <tokens>` — Approximate token budget for the brief
- `--since <when>` — Drop notes/decisions/questions older than this (ISO or 7d/2w/3mo)
- `--depth <n>` — Neighborhood depth for callee context (1-3)
- `--from-prompt <text>` — Infer the symbol from a natural-language prompt
- `--feature <label>` — Use the feature's top symbol when no symbol is given
- `--json` — Emit JSON instead of markdown
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

## `promote`

Find clusters of similar un-promoted notes that should become invariants

```
promote [options] <symbol>
```

**Options:**

- `--min <n>` — Minimum cluster size *(default: "3")*
- `--threshold <f>` — Jaccard similarity threshold (0-1) *(default: "0.4")*
- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

## `question-resolve`

Resolve (or wontfix) an open question by id

```
question-resolve [options] <symbol>
```

**Options:**

- `--id <id>` — Question id
- `--resolution <text>` — Short answer to record
- `--status <s>` — resolved | wontfix | unresolved *(default: "resolved")*
- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

## `questions`

List open questions (by symbol, by feature, or globally)

```
questions [options] [symbol]
```

**Options:**

- `--feature <label>` — Scope to a feature's weight bag
- `--status <s>` — unresolved | resolved | wontfix
- `--limit <n>` — Max questions to print *(default: 50)*
- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

## `record-failure`

Record a tool/test failure against a symbol (fed into `dna suggest`)

```
record-failure [options]
```

**Options:**

- `--symbol <name>` — Symbol to attribute (defaults to last-prepared)
- `--kind <kind>` — test|typecheck|lint|bash|other *(default: "other")*
- `--message <m>` — Short failure message (or pipe via stdin)
- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

## `review-memory`

Maintainer queue: promotions, stale entries, open questions

```
review-memory [options]
```

**Options:**

- `--days <n>` — Staleness threshold in days *(default: 90)*
- `--limit <n>` — Cap per section *(default: 25)*
- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

## `runtime`

Manage the runtime evidence strand

```
runtime [options] [command]
```

### `runtime import`

Import runtime events from a JSON file (Sentry/Datadog/OTel exports)

```
runtime import [options] <file>
```

**Options:**

- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

### `runtime show`

Show runtime events for a symbol

```
runtime show [options] <symbol>
```

**Options:**

- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

## `serve`

Start the dna MCP server (stdio)

```
serve [options]
```

**Options:**

- `--observe` — Record per-symbol query counts to .dna/observations.json (metadata only — symbol name, count, timestamp; never tool arguments or results)

## `session`

Per-session id tracking for replay/audit

```
session [options] [command]
```

### `session start`

Generate a new session id (called by SessionStart hook)

```
session start [options]
```

**Options:**

- `--id <uuid>` — Use a specific id instead of generating one
- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

### `session end`

Clear the active session id (called by SessionEnd hook)

```
session end [options]
```

**Options:**

- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

### `session current`

Print the active session id, if any

```
session current [options]
```

**Options:**

- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

### `session replay`

Print the event log for a session

```
session replay [options] <id>
```

**Options:**

- `--limit <n>` — Max events to print *(default: 200)*
- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

## `stale`

List notes/decisions/open questions older than --days whose file has since changed

```
stale [options]
```

**Options:**

- `--days <n>` — Age threshold in days *(default: "90")*
- `--feature <label>` — Restrict to a feature's symbol bag
- `--changed-only` — Only show entries whose underlying file has changed since
- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

## `suggest`

Symbols with high query traffic and no covering invariant — the authoring queue

```
suggest [options]
```

**Options:**

- `--min <n>` — Minimum query count to include *(default: 3)*
- `--limit <n>` — Max suggestions *(default: 10)*
- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

## `test-record`

Record a test run tied to active symbols (surfaces in `dna prepare` later)

```
test-record [options]
```

**Options:**

- `--command <cmd>` — The test command that was run
- `--exit <code>` — Exit code
- `--symbol <name>` — Symbol to attribute (defaults to last-prepared)
- `--feature <label>` — Feature label to attribute
- `--message <m>` — Short note
- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

## `tests`

Tests likely to cover a symbol — or every symbol in the diff

```
tests [options] [symbol]
```

**Options:**

- `--json` — Emit JSON instead of pretty output
- `--diff` — List tests for every symbol in the working-tree diff
- `--base <ref>` — Diff base (default HEAD) *(default: "HEAD")*
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

## `trace`

Git provenance for a symbol (who, when, last changes)

```
trace [options] <symbol>
```

**Options:**

- `--json` — Emit JSON instead of pretty output
- `--limit <n>` — Number of commits *(default: 10)*
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

## `validate`

Check the symbol graph is in sync with the working tree

```
validate [options]
```

**Options:**

- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--quiet` — Print only on failure
- `--limit <n>` — Max stale paths to list *(default: 20)*
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

## `verify-contract`

Check the working diff against the last saved edit contract

```
verify-contract [options]
```

**Options:**

- `--diff` — Verify against the working-tree diff *(default: true)*
- `--base <ref>` — Diff base (default HEAD) *(default: "HEAD")*
- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

## `waive`

Record an auditable waiver for a blocking invariant

```
waive [options] <invariant>
```

**Options:**

- `--reason <text>` — Why this exception is intentional
- `--by <author>` — Who is recording the waiver
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

## `why`

Everything dna knows about a symbol, in one answer

```
why [options] <symbol>
```

**Options:**

- `--json` — Emit JSON
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)

## `wizard`

Interactive setup: init + agent hooks + first index + preferences seed

```
wizard [options]
```

**Options:**

- `--yes` — Non-interactive; accept defaults (detect Claude/Codex, do everything)
- `--with-claude` — Install Claude Code hooks
- `--with-codex` — Install Codex MCP + AGENTS.md block
- `--skip-index` — Skip building the initial symbol graph
- `--skip-todos` — Skip lifting TODOs into notes
- `--root <path>` — Repo root (default: cwd)
